hook_3s: Ever feel a sudden emotional crash after an intense intimate experience? — The 'Subdrop' is real.
script_voiceover: Ever feel a sudden emotional crash after an intense intimate experience? This is often called 'subdrop,' a real physiological and emotional response as your brain chemistry shifts. It's not a sign of weakness; it's a natural rebalancing. Partners, your understanding is key. Offer gentle comfort, a warm blanket, or a quiet space. Help them rehydrate and nourish their body. A simple check-in can make all the difference. Share this with your partner to foster deeper understanding and support.

caption: Understanding 'subdrop' can transform how partners support each other after intense moments. Build a foundation of empathy and care. AI-generated voice via TTS. #SoftLifeIntimacy #RelationshipTok #WellnessTok #CouplesTok #IntimacyEducation
topic_seed: Subdrop is real (and how partners can help)
